title: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) Earnings: Latest Report, Earnings Call & Financials
text: Public.com aggregates comprehensive earnings data for BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI). The company's most recent earnings announcement occurred on May 5, 2026 for Q1 2026, with revenue of $34.4 million and a net loss of $56.8 million. The earnings call transcript provides management commentary on the company's strategic direction, contract wins, and financial outlook. Management highlighted strong contract wins of $75 million during Q1 2026 in national security and trade & travel markets. The company's backlog increased 14% to $281.9 million, with a $53 million classified sole-source contract serving as a major driver. Gross margins expanded dramatically to 34% from 21.3%, reflecting the impact of Ask Sage's higher-margin generative AI products. The company maintains a strong balance sheet with $431.5 million in cash and investments and minimal debt of $16.5 million. Management reaffirmed full-year 2026 revenue guidance of $135-165 million. The next earnings release is scheduled for August 10, 2026, with an expected EPS loss of -$0.05 for Q2 2026.
